## File: `docs-site/src/layouts/Layout.astro`
```
---
import '../styles/global.css';

interface Props {
  title?: string;
  description?: string;
}

const { 
  title = 'Agent Skills | Microsoft', 
  description = 'Skills, prompts, and MCP configurations for AI coding agents working with Azure SDKs and Microsoft AI Foundry services.'
} = Astro.props;
---

<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <meta name="description" content={description} />
    <link rel="icon" type="image/svg+xml" href="/skills/favicon.svg" />
    <link rel="icon" href="/skills/favicon.ico" />
    <meta name="generator" content={Astro.generator} />
    
    <meta property="og:title" content={title} />
    <meta property="og:description" content={description} />
    <meta property="og:type" content="website" />
    <meta property="og:url" content="https://microsoft.github.io/skills/" />
    <meta property="og:image" content="https://microsoft.github.io/skills/og-image.png" />
    
    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />
    <meta name="twitter:title" content={title} />
    <meta name="twitter:description" content={description} />
    <meta name="twitter:image" content="https://microsoft.github.io/skills/og-image.png" />
    
    <title>{title}</title>
  </head>
  <body>
    <a href="#main-content" class="skip-link">Skip to main content</a>
    <div class="min-h-screen flex flex-col">
      <header class="header">
        <div class="container">
          <div class="header-content">
            <a href="/skills/" class="logo">
              <span class="logo-icon"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="24" height="24" fill="none" stroke="#06b6d4" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M8 18l-4-6 4-6"/><path d="M16 18l4-6-4-6"/><circle cx="12" cy="8" r="1" fill="#06b6d4" stroke="none"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="1" fill="#06b6d4" stroke="none"/><circle cx="12" cy="16" r="1" fill="#06b6d4" stroke="none"/><line x1="12" y1="9" x2="12" y2="11" stroke="#0891b2" stroke-width="1"/><line x1="12" y1="13" x2="12" y2="15" stroke="#0891b2" stroke-width="1"/><circle cx="9.5" cy="10" r="0.75" fill="#0891b2" stroke="none"/><circle cx="14.5" cy="14" r="0.75" fill="#0891b2" stroke="none"/><line x1="10.2" y1="10.3" x2="11.3" y2="11.4" stroke="#0891b2" stroke-width="0.75"/><line x1="12.7" y1="12.6" x2="13.8" y2="13.7" stroke="#0891b2" stroke-width="0.75"/></svg></span>
              <span class="logo-text">Agent Skills</span>
              <span class="logo-tagline">Domain knowledge for coding agents</span>
            </a>
            
            <nav class="nav">
              <a href="https://devblogs.microsoft.com/all-things-azure/context-driven-development-agent-skills-for-microsoft-foundry-and-azure/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="nav-link">
                Blog
              </a>
              <a href="#plugins" class="nav-link">
                Plugins
              </a>
              <a href="#agents" class="nav-link">
                Agents
              </a>
              <a href="#mcp-servers" class="nav-link">
                MCP Servers
              </a>
              <a href="https://microsoft.github.io/skills/#documentation" class="nav-link">
                Docs
              </a>
              <a href="https://github.com/microsoft/skills" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="nav-link github-link">
                <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20" height="20" fill="currentColor">
                  <path d="M12 0c-6.626 0-12 5.373-12 12 0 5.302 3.438 9.8 8.207 11.387.599.111.793-.261.793-.577v-2.234c-3.338.726-4.033-1.416-4.033-1.416-.546-1.387-1.333-1.756-1.333-1.756-1.089-.745.083-.729.083-.729 1.205.084 1.839 1.237 1.839 1.237 1.07 1.834 2.807 1.304 3.492.997.107-.775.418-1.305.762-1.604-2.665-.305-5.467-1.334-5.467-5.931 0-1.311.469-2.381 1.236-3.221-.124-.303-.535-1.524.117-3.176 0 0 1.008-.322 3.301 1.23.957-.266 1.983-.399 3.003-.404 1.02.005 2.047.138 3.006.404 2.291-1.552 3.297-1.23 3.297-1.23.653 1.653.242 2.874.118 3.176.77.84 1.235 1.911 1.235 3.221 0 4.609-2.807 5.624-5.479 5.921.43.372.823 1.102.823 2.222v3.293c0 .319.192.694.801.576 4.765-1.589 8.199-6.086 8.199-11.386 0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12z"/>
                </svg>
                <span class="star-count" id="star-count">★</span>
              </a>
            </nav>
            
            <!-- Mobile hamburger button -->
            <button class="hamburger" id="hamburger-btn" aria-label="Open menu" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="mobile-nav">
              <span class="hamburger-line"></span>
              <span class="hamburger-line"></span>
              <span class="hamburger-line"></span>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </header>
      
      <!-- Install bar - full-width announcement style -->
      <div class="install-bar">
        <div class="container">
          <div class="install-bar-content">
            <span class="install-bar-label">Get started</span>
            <div class="install-code-block">
              <span class="install-prompt">$</span>
              <code id="install-command">npx skills add microsoft/skills</code>
              <button class="install-copy-btn" id="copy-btn" title="Copy to clipboard" aria-label="Copy install command">
                <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                  <rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" ry="2" />
                  <path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 01-2-2V4a2 2 0 012-2h9a2 2 0 012 2v1" />
                </svg>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      
      <!-- Mobile nav drawer - placed before overlay in DOM for correct stacking -->
      <nav class="mobile-nav" id="mobile-nav" aria-label="Mobile navigation">
        <div class="mobile-nav-header">
          <span class="mobile-nav-title">Menu</span>
          <button class="mobile-nav-close" id="mobile-nav-close" aria-label="Close menu">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="24" height="24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
              <path d="M18 6L6 18M6 6l12 12"/>
            </svg>
          </button>
        </div>
        <div class="mobile-nav-links">
          <a href="https://devblogs.microsoft.com/all-things-azure/context-driven-development-agent-skills-for-microsoft-foundry-and-azure/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="mobile-nav-link">
            Blog
          </a>
          <a href="#plugins" class="mobile-nav-link">
            Plugins
          </a>
          <a href="#agents" class="mobile-nav-link">
            Agents
          </a>
          <a href="#mcp-servers" class="mobile-nav-link">
            MCP Servers
          </a>
          <a href="https://microsoft.github.io/skills/#documentation" class="mobile-nav-link">
            Docs
          </a>
          <a href="https://github.com/microsoft/skills" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="mobile-nav-link github-mobile-link">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20" height="20" fill="currentColor">
              <path d="M12 0c-6.626 0-12 5.373-12 12 0 5.302 3.438 9.8 8.207 11.387.599.111.793-.261.793-.577v-2.234c-3.338.726-4.033-1.416-4.033-1.416-.546-1.387-1.333-1.756-1.333-1.756-1.089-.745.083-.729.083-.729 1.205.084 1.839 1.237 1.839 1.237 1.07 1.834 2.807 1.304 3.492.997.107-.775.418-1.305.762-1.604-2.665-.305-5.467-1.334-5.467-5.931 0-1.311.469-2.381 1.236-3.221-.124-.303-.535-1.524.117-3.176 0 0 1.008-.322 3.301 1.23.957-.266 1.983-.399 3.003-.404 1.02.005 2.047.138 3.006.404 2.291-1.552 3.297-1.23 3.297-1.23.653 1.653.242 2.874.118 3.176.77.84 1.235 1.911 1.235 3.221 0 4.609-2.807 5.624-5.479 5.921.43.372.823 1.102.823 2.222v3.293c0 .319.192.694.801.576 4.765-1.589 8.199-6.086 8.199-11.386 0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12z"/>
            </svg>
            GitHub
          </a>
        </div>
      </nav>
      <div class="mobile-nav-overlay" id="mobile-nav-overlay"></div>
      
      <main class="main" id="main-content">
        <slot />
      </main>
      
      <footer class="footer">
        <div class="container">
          <div class="footer-content">
            <div class="footer-links">
              <a href="https://github.com/microsoft/skills/blob/main/LICENSE" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">MIT License</a>
              <span class="footer-divider">•</span>
              <a href="https://github.com/microsoft/skills" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">GitHub</a>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </footer>
    </div>

    <script>
      async function fetchStarCount() {
        try {
          const response = await fetch('https://api.github.com/repos/microsoft/skills');
          const data = await response.json();
          const starCount = document.getElementById('star-count');
          if (starCount && data.stargazers_count) {
            starCount.textContent = `★ ${data.stargazers_count.toLocaleString()}`;
          }
        } catch (e) {
          // Silently fail - star count is not critical
        }
      }
      fetchStarCount();

      // Copy button functionality for install bar
      const copyBtn = document.getElementById('copy-btn');
      const installCommand = document.getElementById('install-command');
      
      copyBtn?.addEventListener('click', async () => {
        const text = installCommand?.textContent || '';
        try {
          await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
          copyBtn.innerHTML = `
            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="2">
              <polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12" />
            </svg>
          `;
          setTimeout(() => {
            copyBtn.innerHTML = `
              <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                <rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" ry="2" />
                <path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 01-2-2V4a2 2 0 012-2h9a2 2 0 012 2v1" />
              </svg>
            `;
          }, 2000);
        } catch (e) {
          console.error('Failed to copy:', e);
        }
      });

      // Mobile navigation
      const hamburgerBtn = document.getElementById('hamburger-btn');
      const mobileNav = document.getElementById('mobile-nav');
      const mobileNavOverlay = document.getElementById('mobile-nav-overlay');
      const mobileNavClose = document.getElementById('mobile-nav-close');

      function openMobileNav() {
        mobileNav?.classList.add('open');
        mobileNavOverlay?.classList.add('open');
        hamburgerBtn?.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'true');
        document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
      }

      function closeMobileNav() {
        mobileNav?.classList.remove('open');
        mobileNavOverlay?.classList.remove('open');
        hamburgerBtn?.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
        document.body.style.overflow = '';
      }

      hamburgerBtn?.addEventListener('click', openMobileNav);
      mobileNavClose?.addEventListener('click', closeMobileNav);

      // Close when clicking outside the drawer (on the overlay area)
      document.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
        if (!mobileNav?.classList.contains('open')) return;
        const target = e.target as HTMLElement;
        // Close if click is outside the drawer and not on the hamburger button
        if (!mobileNav?.contains(target) && !hamburgerBtn?.contains(target)) {
          closeMobileNav();
        }
      });

      // Close on Escape key
      document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'Escape' && mobileNav?.classList.contains('open')) {
          closeMobileNav();
        }
      });

      // Close when clicking a link in mobile nav
      mobileNav?.querySelectorAll('a').forEach((link) => {
        link.addEventListener('click', closeMobileNav);
      });
    </script>

    <style>
      .min-h-screen {
        min-height: 100vh;
      }
      
      .header {
        position: sticky;
        top: 0;
        z-index: 50;
        background: rgba(10, 10, 10, 0.8);
        backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
        -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(12px);
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-primary);
      }
      
      .header-content {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        height: 64px;
      }
      
      .logo {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--space-sm);
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
        font-weight: 700;
        color: var(--text-primary);
        text-decoration: none;
      }
      
      .logo:hover {
        color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      
      .logo-icon {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        width: 24px;
        height: 24px;
      }
      
      .logo-tagline {
        font-size: var(--text-sm);
        font-weight: 400;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        margin-left: var(--space-md);
        padding-left: var(--space-md);
        border-left: 1px solid var(--border-primary);
      }
      
      @media (max-width: 900px) {
        .logo-tagline {
          display: none;
        }
      }
      
      .nav {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--space-lg);
      }
      
      .nav-link {
        font-size: var(--text-sm);
        font-weight: 500;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        text-decoration: none;
        transition: color var(--transition-fast);
      }
      
      .nav-link:hover {
        color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      
      .github-link {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--space-xs);
        padding: var(--space-xs) var(--space-sm);
        background: var(--bg-tertiary);
        border: 1px solid var(--border-primary);
        border-radius: var(--radius-md);
        box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(130, 81, 238, 0.25);
        animation: glow-pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
      }
      
      @keyframes glow-pulse {
        0%, 100% {
          box-shadow: 0 0 12px rgba(130, 81, 238, 0.25);
        }
        50% {
          box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(130, 81, 238, 0.4);
        }
      }
      
      .github-link:hover {
        background: var(--bg-card-hover);
        border-color: var(--border-hover);
        box-shadow: 0 0 24px rgba(130, 81, 238, 0.5);
        animation: none;
      }
      
      .star-count {
        font-size: var(--text-xs);
        color: var(--text-secondary);
      }
      
      .main {
        flex: 1;
      }
      
      .footer {
        border-top: 1px solid var(--border-primary);
        padding: var(--space-xl) 0;
        margin-top: var(--space-3xl);
      }
      
      .footer-content {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--space-md);
        text-align: center;
      }
      
      .footer-links {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--space-md);
      }
      
      .footer-links a {
        font-size: var(--text-sm);
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        text-decoration: none;
        transition: color var(--transition-fast);
      }
      
      .footer-links a:hover {
        color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      
      .footer-divider {
        color: var(--text-muted);
      }
      
      .footer-copyright {
        font-size: var(--text-xs);
        color: var(--text-muted);
      }
      
      /* Hamburger button */
      .hamburger {
        display: none;
        flex-direction: column;
        justify-content: center;
        align-items: center;
        width: 44px;
        height: 44px;
        padding: 0;
        background: transparent;
        border: none;
        cursor: pointer;
        gap: 5px;
      }
      
      .hamburger-line {
        display: block;
        width: 22px;
        height: 2px;
        background: var(--text-primary);
        border-radius: 1px;
        transition: all var(--transition-fast);
      }
      
      .hamburger:hover .hamburger-line {
        background: var(--accent);
      }
      
      @media (max-width: 768px) {
        .nav {
          display: none;
        }
        
        .hamburger {
          display: flex;
        }
      }
      
      /* Mobile nav overlay - purely visual, no pointer events */
      .mobile-nav-overlay {
        position: fixed;
        inset: 0;
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6);
        backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
        -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
        opacity: 0;
        visibility: hidden;
        transition: opacity 0.3s ease, visibility 0.3s ease;
        z-index: 100;
        pointer-events: none;
      }
      
      .mobile-nav-overlay.open {
        opacity: 1;
        visibility: visible;
      }
      
      /* Mobile nav drawer */
      .mobile-nav {
        position: fixed;
        top: 0;
        right: 0;
        width: min(300px, 85vw);
        height: 100%;
        background: var(--bg-secondary);
        border-left: 1px solid var(--border-primary);
        transform: translateX(100%);
        transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        z-index: 110;
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
      }
      
      .mobile-nav.open {
        transform: translateX(0);
      }
      
      .mobile-nav-header {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: space-between;
        padding: var(--space-md) var(--space-lg);
        border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-primary);
      }
      
      .mobile-nav-title {
        font-size: var(--text-lg);
        font-weight: 600;
        color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      
      .mobile-nav-close {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        width: 44px;
        height: 44px;
        padding: 0;
        background: transparent;
        border: none;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        cursor: pointer;
        border-radius: var(--radius-md);
        transition: background var(--transition-fast), color var(--transition-fast);
      }
      
      .mobile-nav-close:hover {
        background: var(--bg-tertiary);
        color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      
      .mobile-nav-links {
        display: flex;
        flex-direction: column;
        padding: var(--space-md);
        gap: var(--space-xs);
      }
      
      .mobile-nav-link {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--space-sm);
        padding: var(--space-md) var(--space-lg);
        font-size: var(--text-base);
        font-weight: 500;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        text-decoration: none;
        border-radius: var(--radius-md);
        transition: background var(--transition-fast), color var(--transition-fast);
        min-height: 44px;
      }
      
      .mobile-nav-link:hover {
        background: var(--bg-tertiary);
        color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      
      .github-mobile-link {
        margin-top: var(--space-md);
        padding-top: var(--space-md);
        border-top: 1px solid var(--border-primary);
      }
      
      /* Skip-to-content link for accessibility */
      .skip-link {
        position: absolute;
        left: -9999px;
        z-index: 999;
        padding: var(--space-sm) var(--space-md);
        background: var(--accent);
        color: var(--bg-primary);
        text-decoration: none;
        border-radius: var(--radius-md);
        font-weight: 500;
        font-size: var(--text-sm);
      }
      
      .skip-link:focus {
        left: var(--space-md);
        top: var(--space-md);
      }
      
      /* Install bar - full-width announcement style */
      .install-bar {
        background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.08) 0%, transparent 100%);
        border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.15);
      }
      
      .install-bar-content {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        gap: var(--space-md);
        padding: var(--space-sm) 0;
      }
      
      .install-bar-label {
        font-size: var(--text-sm);
        font-weight: 500;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
      }
      
      .install-code-block {
        display: inline-flex;
        align-items: center;
        gap: var(--space-sm);
        padding: var(--space-xs) var(--space-md);
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
        border-radius: var(--radius-md);
        font-family: var(--font-mono);
        font-size: var(--text-sm);
      }
      
      .install-prompt {
        color: var(--accent);
        user-select: none;
      }
      
      .install-code-block code {
        color: var(--text-primary);
      }
      
      .install-copy-btn {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        justify-content: center;
        padding: var(--space-xs);
        background: transparent;
        border: none;
        color: var(--text-secondary);
        cursor: pointer;
        border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
        transition: all var(--transition-fast);
      }
      
      .install-copy-btn:hover {
        color: var(--text-primary);
        background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08);
      }
      
      @media (max-width: 600px) {
        .install-bar-content {
          flex-direction: column;
          gap: var(--space-xs);
          padding: var(--space-sm);
        }
        
        .install-bar-label {
          font-size: var(--text-xs);
        }
        
        .install-code-block {
          width: 100%;
          justify-content: space-between;
          font-size: var(--text-xs);
        }
      }
    </style>
  </body>
</html>
```

## File: `docs-site/src/pages/index.astro`
```
---
import Layout from '../layouts/Layout.astro';
import { SkillsSection } from '../components/SkillsSection';
import AgentChip from '../components/AgentChip.astro';
import MCPChip from '../components/MCPChip.astro';
import HookCard from '../components/HookCard.astro';
import skills from '../data/skills.json';
import agents from '../data/agents.json';
import mcpServers from '../data/mcp-servers.json';
import hooks from '../data/hooks.json';
---

<Layout>
  <div class="container">
    <!-- Skills Section with Filters -->
    <SkillsSection client:load skills={skills} />

    <!-- Plugins Section -->
    <section id="plugins" class="section">
      <h2 class="section-title">
        <span class="section-dot"></span>
        Plugins
      </h2>
      <div class="plugins-grid">
        <!-- GitHub Copilot for Azure -->
        <a href="https://github.com/microsoft/GitHub-Copilot-for-Azure" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="doc-card">
          <span class="doc-icon"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 22c5.523 0 10-4.477 10-10S17.523 2 12 2 2 6.477 2 12s4.477 10 10 10z"/><path d="M2 12h20"/><path d="M12 2a15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4 10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1-4-10 15.3 15.3 0 0 1 4-10z"/></svg></span>
          <div class="doc-content">
            <h3 class="doc-title">
              GitHub Copilot for Azure
              <svg class="external-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V8a2 2 0 012-2h6M15 3h6v6M10 14L21 3" />
              </svg>
            </h3>
            <p class="doc-desc">Extensions for VS Code, Visual Studio, and Claude Code — ask questions about Azure services, get help with management and development tasks</p>
          </div>
        </a>

        <!-- Awesome Copilot -->
        <a href="https://github.com/github/awesome-copilot" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="doc-card">
          <span class="doc-icon"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M9.937 15.5A2 2 0 0 0 8.5 14.063l-6.135-1.582a.5.5 0 0 1 0-.962L8.5 9.936A2 2 0 0 0 9.937 8.5l1.582-6.135a.5.5 0 0 1 .963 0L14.063 8.5A2 2 0 0 0 15.5 9.937l6.135 1.581a.5.5 0 0 1 0 .964L15.5 14.063a2 2 0 0 0-1.437 1.437l-1.582 6.135a.5.5 0 0 1-.963 0z"/></svg></span>
          <div class="doc-content">
            <h3 class="doc-title">
              Awesome Copilot
              <svg class="external-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V8a2 2 0 012-2h6M15 3h6v6M10 14L21 3" />
              </svg>
            </h3>
            <p class="doc-desc">Curated list of skills, prompts, plugins, cookbooks, custom agents and more</p>
          </div>
        </a>

        <!-- Deep Wiki -->
        <button type="button" class="doc-card plugin-card-btn" onclick="document.getElementById('deep-wiki-modal').showModal()">
          <span class="doc-icon"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M4 19.5v-15A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 6.5 2H19a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v18a1 1 0 0 1-1 1H6.5a1 1 0 0 1 0-5H20"/><path d="M8 11h8"/><path d="M8 7h6"/></svg></span>
          <div class="doc-content">
            <h3 class="doc-title">Deep Wiki</h3>
            <p class="doc-desc">AI-powered wiki generator — Mermaid diagrams, source citations, onboarding guides, AGENTS.md, and llms.txt for any codebase</p>
          </div>
        </button>

        <!-- Microsoft Foundry -->
        <button type="button" class="doc-card plugin-card-btn" onclick="document.getElementById('foundry-modal').showModal()">
          <span class="doc-icon"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 17 18" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M16.7033 5.59612C16.7033 5.3412 16.497 5.14697 16.2542 5.14697H14.1298C12.6368 5.14697 11.4229 6.36087 11.4229 7.85397V12.3454H13.9963C15.4894 12.3454 16.7033 11.1315 16.7033 9.6384V5.59612Z" fill="currentColor"/><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M10.6701 0L10.5972 14.3847C10.5972 16.3755 8.98275 17.99 6.99196 17.99H0.449036C0.133422 17.99 -0.0729414 17.6865 0.0241706 17.3952L5.26822 2.41566C5.77806 0.97112 7.13763 0 8.66714 0H10.6701Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span>
          <div class="doc-content">
            <h3 class="doc-title">Microsoft Foundry</h3>
            <p class="doc-desc">All-in-one AI Foundry plugin — 39 SDK skills across 4 languages, plus Azure MCP, Foundry MCP, and Microsoft Docs servers</p>
          </div>
        </button>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Deep Wiki Modal -->
    <dialog id="deep-wiki-modal" class="plugin-modal">
      <div class="modal-content">
        <div class="modal-header">
          <div class="modal-title-row">
            <span class="modal-icon"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M4 19.5v-15A2.5 2.5 0 0 1 6.5 2H19a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v18a1 1 0 0 1-1 1H6.5a1 1 0 0 1 0-5H20"/><path d="M8 11h8"/><path d="M8 7h6"/></svg></span>
            <h2 class="modal-title">Deep Wiki</h2>
            <span class="modal-badge">v2.0.0</span>
          </div>
          <button type="button" class="modal-close" onclick="document.getElementById('deep-wiki-modal').close()" aria-label="Close">✕</button>
        </div>
        <p class="modal-desc">AI-powered wiki generator for code repositories. Generates comprehensive, Mermaid-rich documentation with source-linked citations, onboarding guides, AGENTS.md, llms.txt, and dark-mode VitePress sites.</p>

        <div class="modal-section">
          <h3 class="modal-section-title">Install in Copilot CLI</h3>
          <div class="modal-code-block">
            <code>/plugin marketplace add microsoft/skills</code>
            <button type="button" class="copy-btn" onclick="navigator.clipboard.writeText('/plugin marketplace add microsoft/skills');this.textContent='✓';setTimeout(()=>this.textContent='Copy',1500)" aria-label="Copy">Copy</button>
          </div>
          <div class="modal-code-block">
            <code>/plugin install deep-wiki@skills</code>
            <button type="button" class="copy-btn" onclick="navigator.clipboard.writeText('/plugin install deep-wiki@skills');this.textContent='✓';setTimeout(()=>this.textContent='Copy',1500)" aria-label="Copy">Copy</button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="modal-section">
          <h3 class="modal-section-title">Commands</h3>
          <div class="modal-table">
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">/deep-wiki:generate</code>
              <span>Full wiki — catalogue + all pages</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">/deep-wiki:crisp</code>
              <span>Fast wiki — concise, no build step</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">/deep-wiki:catalogue</code>
              <span>Hierarchical structure as JSON</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">/deep-wiki:page</code>
              <span>Single page with Mermaid diagrams</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">/deep-wiki:research</code>
              <span>Multi-turn deep investigation</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">/deep-wiki:changelog</code>
              <span>Structured changelog from git</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">/deep-wiki:ask</code>
              <span>Q&A grounded in source code</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">/deep-wiki:onboard</code>
              <span>4 audience-tailored onboarding guides</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">/deep-wiki:agents</code>
              <span>Generate Agents.md for key folders</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">/deep-wiki:llms</code>
              <span>Generate llms.txt for LLM-friendly access</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">/deep-wiki:build</code>
              <span>Package as VitePress dark-theme site</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">/deep-wiki:ado</code>
              <span>Export to Azure DevOps Wiki format</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">/deep-wiki:deploy</code>
              <span>Deploy wiki to GitHub Pages</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="modal-footer">
          <button type="button" class="modal-share-btn" id="deep-wiki-share-btn" aria-label="Share">
            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
              <path d="M4 12v8a2 2 0 002 2h12a2 2 0 002-2v-8" />
              <polyline points="16 6 12 2 8 6" />
              <line x1="12" y1="2" x2="12" y2="15" />
            </svg>
            Share
          </button>
          <a href="https://github.com/microsoft/skills/tree/main/.github/plugins/deep-wiki" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="modal-link">
            View on GitHub
            <svg class="external-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
              <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V8a2 2 0 012-2h6M15 3h6v6M10 14L21 3" />
            </svg>
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </dialog>

    <!-- Microsoft Foundry Modal -->
    <dialog id="foundry-modal" class="plugin-modal">
      <div class="modal-content">
        <div class="modal-header">
          <div class="modal-title-row">
            <span class="modal-icon"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 17 18" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path d="M16.7033 5.59612C16.7033 5.3412 16.497 5.14697 16.2542 5.14697H14.1298C12.6368 5.14697 11.4229 6.36087 11.4229 7.85397V12.3454H13.9963C15.4894 12.3454 16.7033 11.1315 16.7033 9.6384V5.59612Z" fill="currentColor"/><path fill-rule="evenodd" clip-rule="evenodd" d="M10.6701 0L10.5972 14.3847C10.5972 16.3755 8.98275 17.99 6.99196 17.99H0.449036C0.133422 17.99 -0.0729414 17.6865 0.0241706 17.3952L5.26822 2.41566C5.77806 0.97112 7.13763 0 8.66714 0H10.6701Z" fill="currentColor"/></svg></span>
            <h2 class="modal-title">Microsoft Foundry</h2>
            <span class="modal-badge">v1.0.0</span>
          </div>
          <button type="button" class="modal-close" onclick="document.getElementById('foundry-modal').close()" aria-label="Close">&#x2715;</button>
        </div>
        <p class="modal-desc">All-in-one plugin for Microsoft AI Foundry development. 39 SDK skills across Python, .NET, TypeScript, and Java for agents, voice, search, content safety, and model deployment. Includes three MCP servers for live Azure operations and up-to-date documentation.</p>

        <div class="modal-section">
          <h3 class="modal-section-title">Install</h3>
          <div class="modal-code-block">
            <code>/plugin marketplace add microsoft/skills</code>
            <button type="button" class="copy-btn" onclick="navigator.clipboard.writeText('/plugin marketplace add microsoft/skills');this.textContent='✓';setTimeout(()=>this.textContent='Copy',1500)" aria-label="Copy">Copy</button>
          </div>
          <div class="modal-code-block">
            <code>/plugin install microsoft-foundry@skills</code>
            <button type="button" class="copy-btn" onclick="navigator.clipboard.writeText('/plugin install microsoft-foundry@skills');this.textContent='✓';setTimeout(()=>this.textContent='Copy',1500)" aria-label="Copy">Copy</button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="modal-section">
          <h3 class="modal-section-title">MCP Servers</h3>
          <div class="modal-table">
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">Azure MCP</code>
              <span>Manage 40+ Azure services from your editor</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">Foundry MCP</code>
              <span>Model catalog, agents, indexes at mcp.ai.azure.com</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">Microsoft Docs</code>
              <span>Real-time Microsoft Learn search for current SDK patterns</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="modal-section">
          <h3 class="modal-section-title">Skills by Language</h3>
          <div class="modal-table">
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">Python</code>
              <span>16 skills — projects, agents, hosted agents, search, voice, ML, vision</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">.NET</code>
              <span>8 skills — projects, persistent agents, OpenAI, search, voice</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">TypeScript</code>
              <span>7 skills — projects, search, voice, content safety, translation</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">Java</code>
              <span>7 skills — projects, persistent agents, voice, content safety, vision</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="modal-section">
          <h3 class="modal-section-title">Orchestration</h3>
          <div class="modal-table">
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">project/create</code>
              <span>Provision a new Foundry project</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">models/deploy-model</code>
              <span>Preset, custom, or capacity-aware deployment</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">agent/create</code>
              <span>Scaffold agents with Agent Framework SDK</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">quota</code>
              <span>Check usage and troubleshoot QuotaExceeded</span>
            </div>
            <div class="modal-row">
              <code class="modal-cmd">rbac</code>
              <span>Manage roles, identities, and permissions</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="modal-footer">
          <button type="button" class="modal-share-btn" id="foundry-share-btn" aria-label="Share">
            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
              <path d="M4 12v8a2 2 0 002 2h12a2 2 0 002-2v-8" />
              <polyline points="16 6 12 2 8 6" />
              <line x1="12" y1="2" x2="12" y2="15" />
            </svg>
            Share
          </button>
          <a href="https://github.com/microsoft/skills/tree/main/.github/plugins/microsoft-foundry" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="modal-link">
            View on GitHub
            <svg class="external-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
              <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V8a2 2 0 012-2h6M15 3h6v6M10 14L21 3" />
            </svg>
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </dialog>

    <!-- Hooks Section -->
    <section id="hooks" class="section">
      <h2 class="section-title">
        <span class="section-dot"></span>
        Hooks
      </h2>
      <p class="section-subtitle">Lifecycle hooks for coding agent sessions — install by copying to <code>.github/hooks/</code> in your repo</p>
      <div class="hooks-grid">
        {hooks.map((hook) => (
          <HookCard
            id={hook.id}
            name={hook.name}
            emoji={hook.emoji}
            description={hook.description}
            featured={hook.featured}
            tags={hook.tags}
            path={hook.path}
          />
        ))}
      </div>
      <p class="hooks-more">More hooks available in <a href="https://github.com/github/awesome-copilot/tree/main/hooks" target="_blank" rel="noopener">awesome-copilot<svg class="external-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V8a2 2 0 012-2h6M15 3h6v6M10 14L21 3" /></svg></a></p>
    </section>

    <!-- MCP & Agents Section - Compact -->
    <section id="agents-mcp" class="section section-compact">
      <div class="compact-row">
        <h3 class="compact-title">
          <span class="section-dot"></span>
          MCP Servers
        </h3>
        <div class="docs-grid">
          <a href="https://github.com/microsoft/mcp" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="doc-card">
            <span class="doc-icon"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M15 22v-4a4.8 4.8 0 0 0-1-3.5c3 0 6-2 6-5.5.08-1.25-.27-2.48-1-3.5.28-1.15.28-2.35 0-3.5 0 0-1 0-3 1.5-2.64-.5-5.36-.5-8 0C6 2 5 2 5 2c-.3 1.15-.3 2.35 0 3.5A5.403 5.403 0 0 0 4 9c0 3.5 3 5.5 6 5.5-.39.49-.68 1.05-.85 1.65S8.93 17.38 9 18v4"/><path d="M9 18c-4.51 2-5-2-7-2"/></svg></span>
            <div class="doc-content">
              <h3 class="doc-title">
                Microsoft MCP Catalog
                <svg class="external-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                  <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V8a2 2 0 012-2h6M15 3h6v6M10 14L21 3" />
                </svg>
              </h3>
              <p class="doc-desc">Official Microsoft MCP server implementations for AI-powered data access</p>
            </div>
          </a>
          <a href="https://github.com/microsoft/skills/blob/main/.vscode/mcp.json" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="doc-card">
            <span class="doc-icon"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12.22 2h-.44a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v.18a2 2 0 0 1-1 1.73l-.43.25a2 2 0 0 1-2 0l-.15-.08a2 2 0 0 0-2.73.73l-.22.38a2 2 0 0 0 .73 2.73l.15.1a2 2 0 0 1 1 1.72v.51a2 2 0 0 1-1 1.74l-.15.09a2 2 0 0 0-.73 2.73l.22.38a2 2 0 0 0 2.73.73l.15-.08a2 2 0 0 1 2 0l.43.25a2 2 0 0 1 1 1.73V20a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h.44a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-.18a2 2 0 0 1 1-1.73l.43-.25a2 2 0 0 1 2 0l.15.08a2 2 0 0 0 2.73-.73l.22-.39a2 2 0 0 0-.73-2.73l-.15-.08a2 2 0 0 1-1-1.74v-.5a2 2 0 0 1 1-1.74l.15-.09a2 2 0 0 0 .73-2.73l-.22-.38a2 2 0 0 0-2.73-.73l-.15.08a2 2 0 0 1-2 0l-.43-.25a2 2 0 0 1-1-1.73V4a2 2 0 0 0-2-2z"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/></svg></span>
            <div class="doc-content">
              <h3 class="doc-title">
                Sample Configs
                <svg class="external-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                  <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V8a2 2 0 012-2h6M15 3h6v6M10 14L21 3" />
                </svg>
              </h3>
              <p class="doc-desc">Ready-to-use configs for Microsoft Docs, Context7, GitHub, Playwright</p>
            </div>
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
      
      <div class="compact-row">
        <h3 class="compact-title">
          <span class="section-dot"></span>
          Custom Agents
        </h3>
        <div class="chips-container">
          {agents.map((agent) => (
            <AgentChip
              emoji={agent.emoji}
              name={agent.name}
              description={agent.description}
              skills={agent.skills}
              file={agent.file}
            />
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </section>

    <!-- Documentation Section -->
    <section id="documentation" class="section">
      <h2 class="section-title">
        <span class="section-dot"></span>
        Documentation
      </h2>
      <div class="docs-grid">
        <!-- llms.txt -->
        <a href="/skills/llms.txt" class="doc-card">
          <span class="doc-icon"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M15 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V7z"/><path d="M14 2v4a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h3"/><path d="M10 13H8"/><path d="M16 17H8"/><path d="M16 13h-2"/></svg></span>
          <div class="doc-content">
            <h3 class="doc-title">llms.txt</h3>
            <p class="doc-desc">LLM-friendly documentation index</p>
          </div>
        </a>

        <!-- llms-full.txt -->
        <a href="/skills/llms-full.txt" class="doc-card">
          <span class="doc-icon"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M15 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V7z"/><path d="M14 2v4a1 1 0 0 0 1 1h3"/><path d="M10 13H8"/><path d="M16 17H8"/><path d="M16 13h-2"/></svg></span>
          <div class="doc-content">
            <h3 class="doc-title">llms-full.txt</h3>
            <p class="doc-desc">Complete documentation with full content</p>
          </div>
        </a>

        <!-- Context7 -->
        <a href="https://context7.com/microsoft/skills?tab=skills" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="doc-card">
          <span class="doc-icon"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg></span>
          <div class="doc-content">
            <h3 class="doc-title">
              Browse on Context7
              <svg class="external-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V8a2 2 0 012-2h6M15 3h6v6M10 14L21 3" />
              </svg>
            </h3>
            <p class="doc-desc">Indexed documentation with semantic search</p>
          </div>
        </a>

        <!-- Agents.md -->
        <a href="https://github.com/microsoft/skills/blob/main/Agents.md" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="doc-card">
          <span class="doc-icon"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect width="18" height="18" x="3" y="3" rx="2"/><path d="M12 8v8"/><path d="m8.5 14 7-4"/><path d="m8.5 10 7 4"/></svg></span>
          <div class="doc-content">
            <h3 class="doc-title">
              Agents.md Template
              <svg class="external-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V8a2 2 0 012-2h6M15 3h6v6M10 14L21 3" />
              </svg>
            </h3>
            <p class="doc-desc">Configure agent behavior in your projects</p>
          </div>
        </a>

        <!-- VS Code Agent Skills -->
        <a href="https://code.visualstudio.com/brain/knowledge/docs_legacy/copilot/customization/agent-skills" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="doc-card">
          <span class="doc-icon"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect width="18" height="18" x="3" y="3" rx="2"/><path d="m10 8 4 4-4 4"/></svg></span>
          <div class="doc-content">
            <h3 class="doc-title">
              Copilot Agent Skills in VS Code
              <svg class="external-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V8a2 2 0 012-2h6M15 3h6v6M10 14L21 3" />
              </svg>
            </h3>
            <p class="doc-desc">Learn how GitHub Copilot in VS Code supports agent skills</p>
          </div>
        </a>

        <!-- Blog Post -->
        <a href="https://devblogs.microsoft.com/all-things-azure/context-driven-development-agent-skills-for-microsoft-foundry-and-azure/" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="doc-card">
          <span class="doc-icon"><svg width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 20h9"/><path d="M16.376 3.622a1 1 0 0 1 3.002 3.002L7.368 18.635a2 2 0 0 1-.855.506l-2.872.838a.5.5 0 0 1-.62-.62l.838-2.872a2 2 0 0 1 .506-.854z"/></svg></span>
          <div class="doc-content">
            <h3 class="doc-title">
              Blog: Context-Driven Development
              <svg class="external-icon" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2">
                <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2V8a2 2 0 012-2h6M15 3h6v6M10 14L21 3" />
              </svg>
            </h3>
            <p class="doc-desc">Learn about Agent Skills for Microsoft Foundry</p>
          </div>
        </a>
      </div>
    </section>
  </div>
</Layout>



<style>
  /* Section styles */
  .section {
    padding: var(--space-2xl) 0;
  }

  .section-compact {
    padding: var(--space-xl) 0;
  }

  .section-title {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-sm);
    font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    font-weight: 700;
    margin-bottom: var(--space-xl);
  }

  .section-dot {
    width: 8px;
    height: 8px;
    background: var(--accent);
    border-radius: 50%;
  }

  .section-placeholder {
    color: var(--text-muted);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-style: italic;
    padding: var(--space-xl) 0;
  }

  /* Compact row layout for Agents & MCP */
  .compact-row {
    margin-bottom: var(--space-lg);
  }

  .compact-row:last-child {
    margin-bottom: 0;
  }

  .compact-title {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-sm);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    margin: 0 0 var(--space-md) 0;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  }

  .compact-title .section-dot {
    width: 6px;
    height: 6px;
  }

  .chips-container {
    display: flex;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
    gap: var(--space-sm);
  }

  /* Documentation Section */
  .docs-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
    gap: var(--space-lg);
  }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .docs-grid {
      grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
    }
  }

  /* Plugins Section */
  .plugins-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: var(--space-lg);
  }

  @media (max-width: 768px) {
    .plugins-grid {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
  }

  /* Hooks Section */
  .section-subtitle {
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    margin: calc(-1 * var(--space-md)) 0 var(--space-lg) 0;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }

  .section-subtitle code {
    font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace;
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--accent);
    background: rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.08);
    padding: 2px 6px;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  }

  .hooks-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
    gap: var(--space-lg);
  }

  @media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .hooks-grid {
      grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
    }
  }

  @media (max-width: 640px) {
    .hooks-grid {
      grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    }
  }

  .hooks-more {
    margin-top: var(--space-md);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--text-muted);
    text-align: right;
  }

  .hooks-more a {
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    text-decoration: none;
    display: inline-flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 4px;
    transition: color var(--transition-fast);
  }

  .hooks-more a:hover {
    color: var(--accent);
  }

  .hooks-more .external-icon {
    width: 12px;
    height: 12px;
  }

  .doc-card {
    display: flex;
    align-items: flex-start;
    gap: var(--space-md);
    padding: var(--space-lg);
    background: var(--bg-card);
    border: 1px solid var(--border-primary);
    border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all var(--transition-base);
    min-height: 100px;
  }

  .doc-card:hover {
    background: var(--bg-card-hover);
    border-color: var(--border-hover);
    box-shadow: 0 0 24px var(--accent-glow);
    transform: translateY(-2px);
  }

  .doc-icon {
    font-size: var(--text-2xl);
    flex-shrink: 0;
    line-height: 1;
    width: 32px;
    height: 32px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
  }

  .doc-content {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: var(--space-xs);
    min-width: 0;
  }

  .doc-title {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-xs);
    font-size: var(--text-base);
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-primary);
    margin: 0;
  }

  .doc-desc {
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    margin: 0;
    line-height: 1.5;
  }

  .doc-secondary {
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--text-tertiary);
    margin-top: var(--space-xs);
  }

  .doc-link-inline {
    color: var(--accent);
    text-decoration: underline;
    text-underline-offset: 2px;
  }

  .doc-link-inline:hover {
    color: var(--accent-hover);
  }

  .external-icon {
    width: 14px;
    height: 14px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    opacity: 0.6;
  }

  .doc-card:hover .external-icon {
    opacity: 1;
  }

  /* Plugin card as button */
  .plugin-card-btn {
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: inherit;
    text-align: left;
    border: 1px solid var(--border-primary);
  }

  /* Modal */
  .plugin-modal {
    background: var(--bg-card);
    color: var(--text-primary);
    border: 1px solid var(--border-hover);
    border-radius: var(--radius-xl);
    padding: 0;
    max-width: 560px;
    width: 90vw;
    inset: 0;
    margin: auto;
    box-shadow: 0 0 60px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.6), 0 0 30px var(--accent-glow);
  }

  .plugin-modal::backdrop {
    background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7);
    backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
  }

  .modal-content {
    padding: var(--space-xl);
  }

  .modal-header {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: flex-start;
    margin-bottom: var(--space-md);
  }

  .modal-title-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-sm);
  }

  .modal-icon {
    font-size: var(--text-2xl);
  }

  .modal-title {
    font-size: var(--text-xl);
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0;
  }

  .modal-badge {
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--accent);
    background: rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.1);
    border: 1px solid rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.2);
    padding: 2px 8px;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  }

  .modal-close {
    background: none;
    border: none;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-lg);
    cursor: pointer;
    padding: var(--space-xs);
    line-height: 1;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  }

  .modal-close:hover {
    color: var(--text-primary);
    background: var(--bg-card-hover);
  }

  .modal-desc {
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin: 0 0 var(--space-lg) 0;
  }

  .modal-section {
    margin-bottom: var(--space-lg);
  }

  .modal-section-title {
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    text-transform: uppercase;
    letter-spacing: 0.05em;
    margin: 0 0 var(--space-sm) 0;
  }

  .modal-code-block {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    background: #0a0a0a;
    border: 1px solid var(--border-primary);
    border-radius: var(--radius-md);
    padding: var(--space-sm) var(--space-md);
    margin-bottom: var(--space-xs);
    font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace;
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
  }

  .modal-code-block code {
    color: var(--accent);
  }

  .copy-btn {
    background: none;
    border: 1px solid var(--border-primary);
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    padding: 2px 10px;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    cursor: pointer;
    font-family: inherit;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  .copy-btn:hover {
    border-color: var(--accent);
    color: var(--accent);
  }

  .modal-table {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: var(--space-xs);
  }

  .modal-row {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-md);
    padding: var(--space-xs) 0;
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    color: var(--text-secondary);
  }

  .modal-cmd {
    font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace;
    font-size: var(--text-xs);
    color: var(--accent);
    background: rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.08);
    padding: 2px 8px;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    white-space: nowrap;
  }

  .modal-footer {
    padding-top: var(--space-md);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border-primary);
    display: flex;
    justify-content: flex-end;
    gap: var(--space-md);
  }

  .modal-link {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-xs);
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    text-decoration: none;
  }

  .modal-link:hover {
    color: var(--accent);
  }

  .modal-share-btn {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: var(--space-xs);
    color: var(--text-secondary);
    font-size: var(--text-sm);
    background: transparent;
    border: 1px solid var(--border-primary);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    padding: 4px 10px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all var(--transition-fast);
  }

  .modal-share-btn:hover {
    color: var(--accent);
    border-color: var(--accent);
  }
</style>

<script>
  // Deep Wiki share button
  document.getElementById('deep-wiki-share-btn')?.addEventListener('click', function() {
    const url = `${window.location.origin}${window.location.pathname}#plugin=deep-wiki`;
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(() => {
      const btn = this;
      btn.textContent = '✓ Copied!';
      btn.style.color = '#22c55e';
      btn.style.borderColor = '#22c55e';
      setTimeout(() => {
        btn.innerHTML = '<svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 12v8a2 2 0 002 2h12a2 2 0 002-2v-8" /><polyline points="16 6 12 2 8 6" /><line x1="12" y1="2" x2="12" y2="15" /></svg> Share';
        btn.style.color = '';
        btn.style.borderColor = '';
      }, 2000);
    });
  });

  document.getElementById('foundry-share-btn')?.addEventListener('click', function() {
    const url = `${window.location.origin}${window.location.pathname}#plugin=microsoft-foundry`;
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(url).then(() => {
      const btn = this;
      btn.textContent = '✓ Copied!';
      btn.style.color = '#22c55e';
      btn.style.borderColor = '#22c55e';
      setTimeout(() => {
        btn.innerHTML = '<svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 12v8a2 2 0 002 2h12a2 2 0 002-2v-8" /><polyline points="16 6 12 2 8 6" /><line x1="12" y1="2" x2="12" y2="15" /></svg> Share';
        btn.style.color = '';
        btn.style.borderColor = '';
      }, 2000);
    });
  });

  // Hash routing for plugin modals
  function checkPluginHash() {
    const hash = window.location.hash;
    if (hash === '#plugin=deep-wiki') {
      document.getElementById('deep-wiki-modal')?.showModal();
    } else if (hash === '#plugin=microsoft-foundry') {
      document.getElementById('foundry-modal')?.showModal();
    }
  }

  // Check on load and hash change
  checkPluginHash();
  window.addEventListener('hashchange', checkPluginHash);

  // Clear hash when modal closes
  document.getElementById('deep-wiki-modal')?.addEventListener('close', () => {
    if (window.location.hash === '#plugin=deep-wiki') {
      history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname + window.location.search);
    }
  });

  document.getElementById('foundry-modal')?.addEventListener('close', () => {
    if (window.location.hash === '#plugin=microsoft-foundry') {
      history.replaceState(null, '', window.location.pathname + window.location.search);
    }
  });

  // Set hash when modal opens via button
  document.querySelectorAll('.plugin-card-btn').forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const modalId = btn.getAttribute('onclick')?.match(/getElementById\('(.+?)'\)/)?.[1];
      if (modalId === 'deep-wiki-modal') history.replaceState(null, '', '#plugin=deep-wiki');
      if (modalId === 'foundry-modal') history.replaceState(null, '', '#plugin=microsoft-foundry');
    });
  });
</script>
```

## File: `docs-site/src/styles/global.css`
```css
/* Factory.ai-inspired DARK theme design tokens */
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap');

:root {
  /* Background colors */
  --bg-primary: #0a0a0a;
  --bg-secondary: #111111;
  --bg-tertiary: #1a1a1a;
  --bg-card: #0f0f0f;
  --bg-card-hover: #161616;
  
  /* Text colors */
  --text-primary: #ffffff;
  --text-secondary: #a1a1a1;
  --text-tertiary: #9ca3af;  /* WCAG AA compliant - 5.0:1 contrast on #1a1a1a */
  --text-muted: #9ca3af;
  
  /* Accent colors */
  --accent: #06b6d4;
  --accent-hover: #0891b2;
  --accent-glow: rgba(6, 182, 212, 0.15);
  
  /* Border colors */
  --border-primary: #262626;
  --border-secondary: #1f1f1f;
  --border-hover: #404040;
  
  /* Language badge colors - WCAG AA compliant for dark backgrounds */
  --lang-python: #60a5fa;
  --lang-dotnet: #a78bfa;
  --lang-typescript: #facc15;
  --lang-java: #f87171;
  --lang-rust: #fb923c;
  --lang-core: #9ca3af;
  
  /* Shadows */
  --shadow-sm: 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  --shadow-md: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  --shadow-lg: 0 10px 15px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
  --shadow-glow: 0 0 20px var(--accent-glow);
  
  /* Spacing */
  --space-xs: 0.25rem;
  --space-sm: 0.5rem;
  --space-md: 1rem;
  --space-lg: 1.5rem;
  --space-xl: 2rem;
  --space-2xl: 3rem;
  --space-3xl: 4rem;
  
  /* Border radius */
  --radius-sm: 0.375rem;
  --radius-md: 0.5rem;
  --radius-lg: 0.75rem;
  --radius-xl: 1rem;
  
  /* Typography */
  --font-sans: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
  --font-mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', Consolas, monospace;
  
  /* Font sizes */
  --text-xs: 0.75rem;
  --text-sm: 0.875rem;
  --text-base: 1rem;
  --text-lg: 1.125rem;
  --text-xl: 1.25rem;
  --text-2xl: 1.5rem;
  --text-3xl: 1.875rem;
  --text-4xl: 2.25rem;
  --text-5xl: 3rem;
  
  /* Line heights */
  --leading-tight: 1.25;
  --leading-normal: 1.5;
  --leading-relaxed: 1.75;
  
  /* Transitions */
  --transition-fast: 150ms ease;
  --transition-base: 200ms ease;
  --transition-slow: 300ms ease;
}

/* Reset */
*, *::before, *::after {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  margin: 0;
  padding: 0;
}

/* Base styles */
html {
  font-family: var(--font-sans);
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: var(--leading-normal);
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
  -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
}

body {
  background-color: var(--bg-primary);
  color: var(--text-primary);
  min-height: 100vh;
  overflow-x: hidden;
}

/* Diagonal stripe background */
.bg-stripes {
  background-image: 
    repeating-linear-gradient(
      45deg,
      transparent,
      transparent 10px,
      rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02) 10px,
      rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.02) 20px
    );
}

/* Section marker (orange dot + uppercase label) */
.section-marker {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: var(--space-sm);
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  color: var(--text-secondary);
}

.section-marker::before {
  content: '●';
  color: var(--accent);
  font-size: 0.5rem;
}

/* Headings */
h1, h2, h3, h4, h5, h6 {
  font-weight: 700;
  line-height: var(--leading-tight);
  color: var(--text-primary);
}

h1 {
  font-size: var(--text-5xl);
  font-weight: 800;
}

h2 {
  font-size: var(--text-3xl);
}

h3 {
  font-size: var(--text-2xl);
}

/* Links */
a {
  color: var(--accent);
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: color var(--transition-fast);
}

a:hover {
  color: var(--accent-hover);
}

/* Cards with glassmorphism */
.card {
  background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-primary);
  border-radius: var(--radius-lg);
  padding: var(--space-lg);
  transition: all var(--transition-base);
}

.card:hover {
  background: var(--bg-card-hover);
  border-color: var(--border-hover);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
}

.card-glass {
  background: rgba(15, 15, 15, 0.8);
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
}

/* Language badges */
.badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding: var(--space-xs) var(--space-sm);
  font-size: var(--text-xs);
  font-weight: 500;
  border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}

.badge-python {
  background: rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.15);
  color: var(--lang-python);
  border: 1px solid rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.3);
}

.badge-dotnet {
  background: rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.15);
  color: var(--lang-dotnet);
  border: 1px solid rgba(139, 92, 246, 0.3);
}

.badge-typescript {
  background: rgba(234, 179, 8, 0.15);
  color: var(--lang-typescript);
  border: 1px solid rgba(234, 179, 8, 0.3);
}

.badge-java {
  background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15);
  color: var(--lang-java);
  border: 1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.3);
}

.badge-rust {
  background: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.15);
  color: var(--lang-rust);
  border: 1px solid rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.3);
}

.badge-core {
  background: rgba(107, 114, 128, 0.15);
  color: var(--lang-core);
  border: 1px solid rgba(107, 114, 128, 0.3);
}

/* Buttons */
.btn {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: var(--space-sm);
  padding: var(--space-sm) var(--space-lg);
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  font-weight: 500;
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  border: none;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: all var(--transition-fast);
}

.btn-primary {
  background: var(--accent);
  color: var(--text-primary);
}

.btn-primary:hover {
  background: var(--accent-hover);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-glow);
}

.btn-secondary {
  background: transparent;
  color: var(--text-primary);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-primary);
}

.btn-secondary:hover {
  background: var(--bg-tertiary);
  border-color: var(--border-hover);
}

/* Input fields */
.input {
  width: 100%;
  padding: var(--space-sm) var(--space-md);
  font-size: var(--text-sm);
  color: var(--text-primary);
  background: var(--bg-secondary);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-primary);
  border-radius: var(--radius-md);
  outline: none;
  transition: all var(--transition-fast);
}

.input:focus {
  border-color: var(--accent);
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--accent-glow);
}

.input::placeholder {
  color: var(--text-muted);
}

/* Scrollbar styling */
::-webkit-scrollbar {
  width: 8px;
  height: 8px;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
  background: var(--bg-secondary);
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
  background: var(--border-primary);
  border-radius: 4px;
}

::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {
  background: var(--border-hover);
}

/* Focus visible for accessibility */
:focus-visible {
  outline: 2px solid var(--accent);
  outline-offset: 2px;
}

/* Selection */
::selection {
  background: var(--accent);
  color: var(--text-primary);
}

/* Container */
.container {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 1280px;
  margin: 0 auto;
  padding: 0 var(--space-lg);
}

/* Grid utilities */
.grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: var(--space-lg);
}

.grid-cols-1 { grid-template-columns: repeat(1, 1fr); }
.grid-cols-2 { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
.grid-cols-3 { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
.grid-cols-4 { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); }

@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  .lg\:grid-cols-3 { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
  .lg\:grid-cols-2 { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .md\:grid-cols-2 { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
  .md\:grid-cols-1 { grid-template-columns: repeat(1, 1fr); }
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .sm\:grid-cols-1 { grid-template-columns: repeat(1, 1fr); }
}

/* Flex utilities */
.flex { display: flex; }
.flex-col { flex-direction: column; }
.items-center { align-items: center; }
.justify-center { justify-content: center; }
.justify-between { justify-content: space-between; }
.gap-sm { gap: var(--space-sm); }
.gap-md { gap: var(--space-md); }
.gap-lg { gap: var(--space-lg); }

/* Skills Grid - Responsive */
.skills-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: var(--space-lg);
}

@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  .skills-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .skills-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  }
}

@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .skills-grid {
    grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
  }
}
```

## File: `hooks/continual-learning/learn.sh`
```bash
#!/bin/bash
# Continual Learning — single script, all events
# Usage: learn.sh <event>  (sessionStart | postToolUse | sessionEnd)
#
# Auto-initializes on first run. No manual setup needed.
# Two-tier memory: global (~/.copilot/learnings.db) + local (.copilot-memory/)

set -euo pipefail

[[ "${SKIP_CONTINUAL_LEARNING:-}" == "true" ]] && exit 0

EVENT="${1:-}"
INPUT=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo "{}")

# --- Paths ---
GLOBAL_DB="$HOME/.copilot/learnings.db"
LOCAL_DIR=".copilot-memory"
LOCAL_DB="$LOCAL_DIR/learnings.db"

# --- Auto-init (creates everything on first run) ---
init_db() {
  local db="$1"
  mkdir -p "$(dirname "$db")"
  command -v sqlite3 &>/dev/null || return 0
  sqlite3 "$db" <<'SQL'
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS learnings (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    scope TEXT NOT NULL,          -- 'global' or 'local'
    category TEXT NOT NULL,       -- 'pattern', 'mistake', 'preference', 'tool_insight'
    content TEXT NOT NULL,
    source TEXT,                  -- repo name, session id, etc.
    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
    last_seen TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),
    hit_count INTEGER DEFAULT 1
);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS tool_log (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    tool_name TEXT,
    result TEXT,
    ts TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))
);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_learnings_scope ON learnings(scope);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_learnings_category ON learnings(category);
SQL
}

init_db "$GLOBAL_DB"
[[ -d ".git" ]] && init_db "$LOCAL_DB"

has_sqlite() { command -v sqlite3 &>/dev/null; }
has_jq() { command -v jq &>/dev/null; }
repo_name() { basename "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; }

# ─── SESSION START ──────────────────────────────────────────
on_session_start() {
  has_sqlite || { echo "🧠 Continual learning active"; exit 0; }

  local context=""

  # Load global learnings (cross-project)
  local global_count
  global_count=$(sqlite3 "$GLOBAL_DB" "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM learnings;" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  if [[ "$global_count" -gt 0 ]]; then
    local top_global
    top_global=$(sqlite3 "$GLOBAL_DB" \
      "SELECT '• [' || category || '] ' || content FROM learnings
       ORDER BY hit_count DESC, last_seen DESC LIMIT 5;" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
    [[ -n "$top_global" ]] && context="Global learnings ($global_count total):\n$top_global"
  fi

  # Load local learnings (this repo)
  if [[ -f "$LOCAL_DB" ]]; then
    local local_count
    local_count=$(sqlite3 "$LOCAL_DB" "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM learnings;" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
    if [[ "$local_count" -gt 0 ]]; then
      local top_local
      top_local=$(sqlite3 "$LOCAL_DB" \
        "SELECT '• [' || category || '] ' || content FROM learnings
         ORDER BY hit_count DESC, last_seen DESC LIMIT 5;" 2>/dev/null || echo "")
      [[ -n "$top_local" ]] && context="$context\n\nRepo learnings for $(repo_name) ($local_count total):\n$top_local"
    fi
  fi

  if [[ -n "$context" ]]; then
    echo "🧠 Continual learning — loaded prior knowledge"
    echo -e "$context" >&2
  else
    echo "🧠 Continual learning active — building knowledge from this session"
  fi
}

# ─── POST TOOL USE ──────────────────────────────────────────
on_post_tool_use() {
  has_sqlite || exit 0

  local tool_name="" result=""
  if has_jq; then
    tool_name=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolName // empty' 2>/dev/null || echo "")
    result=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.toolResult.resultType // "unknown"' 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
  fi
  [[ -z "$tool_name" ]] && exit 0

  # Log to global (tool patterns are cross-project)
  sqlite3 "$GLOBAL_DB" \
    "INSERT INTO tool_log (tool_name, result) VALUES ('$(echo "$tool_name" | tr "'" "''")','$result');" 2>/dev/null || true
}

# ─── SESSION END ────────────────────────────────────────────
on_session_end() {
  has_sqlite || { echo "🧠 Session ended"; exit 0; }

  # --- Analyze tool patterns ---
  local total failures
  total=$(sqlite3 "$GLOBAL_DB" \
    "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tool_log WHERE ts > datetime('now','-4 hours');" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
  failures=$(sqlite3 "$GLOBAL_DB" \
    "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tool_log WHERE result='failure' AND ts > datetime('now','-4 hours');" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")

  # Detect repeated failure patterns → store as global learning
  local fail_tools
  fail_tools=$(sqlite3 "$GLOBAL_DB" \
    "SELECT tool_name FROM tool_log
     WHERE result='failure' AND ts > datetime('now','-4 hours')
     GROUP BY tool_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 2;" 2>/dev/null || echo "")

  if [[ -n "$fail_tools" ]]; then
    while IFS= read -r tool; do
      [[ -z "$tool" ]] && continue
      local safe_tool
      safe_tool=$(echo "$tool" | tr "'" "''")
      # Upsert: increment hit_count if learning already exists
      sqlite3 "$GLOBAL_DB" \
        "INSERT INTO learnings (scope, category, content, source)
         SELECT 'global','tool_insight','Tool \"$safe_tool\" frequently fails — check usage pattern','auto:$(date -u +%Y%m%d)'
         WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM learnings WHERE content LIKE '%$safe_tool%frequently fails%');
         UPDATE learnings SET hit_count = hit_count + 1, last_seen = datetime('now')
         WHERE content LIKE '%$safe_tool%frequently fails%';" 2>/dev/null || true
    done <<< "$fail_tools"
  fi

  # --- Compact: prune old tool logs (keep 7 days) ---
  sqlite3 "$GLOBAL_DB" "DELETE FROM tool_log WHERE ts < datetime('now','-7 days');" 2>/dev/null || true

  # --- Compact: decay old learnings (>60 days, low hit count) ---
  sqlite3 "$GLOBAL_DB" \
    "DELETE FROM learnings WHERE last_seen < datetime('now','-60 days') AND hit_count < 3;" 2>/dev/null || true
  [[ -f "$LOCAL_DB" ]] && sqlite3 "$LOCAL_DB" \
    "DELETE FROM learnings WHERE last_seen < datetime('now','-60 days') AND hit_count < 3;" 2>/dev/null || true

  echo "🧠 Session reflected — tools: $total, failures: $failures"
  [[ -n "$fail_tools" ]] && echo "  ⚠️ Stored failure patterns for: $(echo "$fail_tools" | tr '\n' ', ')"
}

# ─── Dispatch ───────────────────────────────────────────────
case "$EVENT" in
  sessionStart)   on_session_start ;;
  postToolUse)    on_post_tool_use ;;
  sessionEnd)     on_session_end ;;
  *)              echo "Usage: learn.sh <sessionStart|postToolUse|sessionEnd>" >&2; exit 1 ;;
esac

exit 0
```

## File: `hooks/continual-learning/README.md`
```markdown
---
name: 'Continual Learning'
description: 'Hooks that enable AI coding agents to learn, reflect, and persist knowledge across sessions'
tags: ['learning', 'memory', 'reflection', 'productivity', 'featured']
---

# Continual Learning Hook

Your agent forgets everything between sessions. This hook fixes that.

## Quick Start

```bash
cp -r hooks/continual-learning .github/hooks/
```

That's it. The hook auto-initializes on first session — no config, no setup, no manual steps.

## What It Does

- **Session start** — Loads learnings from previous sessions (global + this repo)
- **During session** — Tracks tool outcomes silently
- **Session end** — Reflects on patterns, stores insights, compacts old data

## Two-Tier Memory

| Scope | Location | What goes here |
|-------|----------|----------------|
| **Global** | `~/.copilot/learnings.db` | Tool patterns, cross-project insights |
| **Local** | `.copilot-memory/learnings.db` | Repo conventions, project-specific mistakes |

Global learnings follow you everywhere. Local learnings stay with the project.

Both auto-create on first run. Local memory only activates inside a git repo.

## How It Compounds

| Time | Effect |
|------|--------|
| Day 1 | Agent starts fresh — hook begins observing |
| Week 2 | Failure patterns detected, surfaced at session start |
| Month 2 | Rich context loaded — agent avoids known pitfalls |

Old low-value learnings decay automatically (60-day TTL, low hit count). High-value learnings persist and rank higher.

## Adding Learnings Manually

The agent can also write learnings directly using its built-in `store_memory` tool or SQL:

```sql
-- Agent writes a repo-specific learning
INSERT INTO learnings (scope, category, content, source)
VALUES ('local', 'mistake', 'Use semantic_configuration_name= not semantic_configuration=', 'user_correction');
```

## Architecture

```
learn.sh <event>          ← Single script handles all lifecycle events
    │
    ├── sessionStart      → Query both DBs, surface top learnings
    ├── postToolUse       → Log tool name + result (3ms overhead)
    └── sessionEnd        → Analyze patterns, persist insights, compact old data
```

## Disable

```bash
export SKIP_CONTINUAL_LEARNING=true
```

## Requirements

- `sqlite3` (pre-installed on macOS and most Linux)
- `jq` (optional — gracefully degrades without it)
```
